sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102316" key="tanta/leios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταντᾰ´λ-ειος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταντᾰ´λ-εος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταντᾰλ-ίδης</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταντᾰλ-ικός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταντᾰλ-ίς</orth>, <sense id="n102316.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Τάνταλος</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
